docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-07-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF JUDY LEE IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE ALBERT HU BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,488.20 FILED BY LEE, JUDY AS TO DEFENDANT HU, ALBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HU, ALBERT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO AUG-08-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CONTACTED BY PHONE, DEFENDANT LEFT VOICEMAIL TO INFORM REGARDING OF THE CONTINUANCE. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-03-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-05-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-26-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING [HEARING:JUNE-09-2023 AT 8:30AM] (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, JUDY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-09-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUDY LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALBERT HU IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT ALBERT HU WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF REFUSED TO PARTAKE IN DISCOVERY OF EXHIBITS. CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT FOR DEFENDANT ALBERT HU TO FIND OUT IF MONEY HAS BEEN CASHED. IF PAYMENT HASN'T CLEARED, DEFENDANT IS TO COME WITH CASHIER CHECK AND PRESENT IT TO THE PLAINTIFF AT THE NEXT COURT DATE. PROGRESS REPORT IS SET FOR JUNE-09, 2023 AT 8:30 A.M. IN DEPT 506. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, JUDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HU, ALBERT DEFENDANT SHOWED HIS BANK ON-LINE TRANSACTIONS CONFIRMING PAYMENT FOR 11/23 $600, AND 1/23 $1,188.20, 12/22 $600 IS ALSO PAID BUT ON 1.3.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY LEE, JUDY HU, ALBERT
